how_to_apply: Visit the official website http://indianrailways.gov.in/

jobs.age_relaxation_notes: age relaxation will be given as per the rules
selection_process: A skill test is mandatory for the posts of Tax Assistant (data entry speed) and Stenographer Grade-II (dictation and transcription). Selection for the MTS post is based entirely on a merit list of sports achievements; there is no skill test for it.
jobs.application_address: Send the application form: Deputy Commissioner of Income Tax (Hqrs.) (Admn. & Vig.), O/o the Pr. Chief Commissioner of Income Tax, 1st Floor, Aayakar Bhawan, Rajaswa Vihar, Bhubaneswar-751007.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Candidates need a Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized University or equivalent, along with a data entry speed of 8,000 key depressions per hour.

Candidates need a 12th class pass or equivalent from a recognized Board/University, and must clear the skill test: dictation of 10 minutes @ 80 words per minute, followed by transcription within 50 minutes in English or 65 minutes in Hindi (on computer).
Candidates need Matriculation (10th pass) or equivalent from a recognized board. No additional skill test is prescribed for this post.

jobs.title: NBEMS Vacancy 2026, Check Eligibility & How to Apply
jobs.age_relaxation_notes: age relaxation will be given as per the rules
selection_process: Skill Test (if required for a specific post)
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://natboard.edu.in/recruitment
Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage.
First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password.
After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position.
Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable).
Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking].
Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors.
After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

jobs.title: Jal Shakti Vibhag Vacancy 2026, Apply For Para Cook, Para Helper Posts
jobs.age_relaxation_notes: age relaxation will be given as per the rules
selection_process: All received applications will be scrutinized. Shortlisted candidates will then be called for a Skill Test/Physical Test. Further information regarding the selection process will be released by the department.
how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or use the link below.
Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details.
Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.).
Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview.
Envelope: Also, attach a self-addressed envelope measuring 25 cm x 10 cm. If required in the notification.
The envelope containing the application should be superscribed “Application for the post of __________________________.”
Send it to the address given in the notification.
jobs.jobs_info: Jal Shakti Vibhag Vacancy 2026: The Engineer-in-Chief, Jal Shakti Vibhag, Jal Shakti Bhawan, Shimla, has issued a notification for the positions of Para Cook and Para Helper. The recruitment drive comprises 02 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026 official notification and apply before 04-07-2026, the last Date. Also, see all the information related to the post on the official website. All relevant information regarding the Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026 is provided below.

vacancy_details.eligibility: The minimum educational qualification is 10th pass. Candidates must also possess a degree/diploma in Hotel Management or Craftsmanship or Cookery from a government-recognized institution.
The minimum educational qualification is 10th grade. Candidates with experience in local cuisine, cooking, or catering are preferred.

faqs.question: What is the application fee, and how can it be paid?
faqs.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is ₹ 00/-. For SC/ST/Female candidates, it is ₹00/-. The fee can be paid online via Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, or UPI.

faqs.answer: The last date to fill out the online form is 04-07-2026.

headings: PM Shri School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Odhan Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
PM Shri School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Odhan Recruitment 2026 Application Fees
PM Shri School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Odhan Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
PM Shri School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Odhan Recruitment 2026 Salary / Stipend
PM Shri School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Odhan Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
Eligibility Details
1. Skill Teacher – Agriculture Course
2. Yoga Trainer/Instructor (Female preferred)
3. Dance Expert
4. Self-Defense Trainer (Female)
5. Judo Coach
6. Matron
Age Limit
Number of Posts
PM Shri School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Odhan Recruitment 2026 How to Apply
PM Shri School Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Odhan Recruitment 2026 Important Links

1. Skill Teacher – Agriculture Course: Bachelor’s Degree or Diploma in Agriculture/Horticulture. At least 1 year of teaching/training experience in the relevant field.
2. Yoga Trainer/Instructor (Female prefe: Graduation from a recognized university and a 1-year Post Graduate Diploma in Yoga. Or Post Graduate Diploma in Yoga. Or Bachelor’s Degree with a Certificate Course in Yoga.
3. Dance Expert: Degree/Diploma in Classical Dance from a recognized institution. Such as Praveen, Visharad, Ratna, or Prabhakar, or equivalent qualification.
4. Self-Defense Trainer (Female): Training in Martial Arts/Self-Defense from a recognized institution. Coaching Diploma or Certificate in Judo/Taekwondo/Karate, etc. At least 1 year of experience in the relevant field.
5. Judo Coach: Bachelor’s Degree in any subject from a recognized university/institution. Coaching Diploma or Certificate Course in Judo/Taekwondo. Coaching qualification from Netaji Subhas National Institute of Sports (NSNIS) or any state government sports institute. Coaching experience at a reputable institute. OR B.P.Ed/M.P.Ed degree with state or national level sports participation.
6. Matron: Minimum educational qualification: 10th pass. Candidates with higher educational qualifications may be given preference. Married women will be given preference. Widows or divorced women will also be given preference.
Number of Posts: Skill Teacher (Agriculture): 01 Yoga Trainer/Instructor: 01 Dance Expert: 01 Self Defense Trainer (Female): 01 Judo Coach: 01 Matron: 03
